3048290.name: Office Hero
3048290.description:
You choose your hero, collect weapons and upgrades, and face off against robotic enemies that have taken over the company you work for. Every floor of the building brings a new challenge. You must survive waves of increasingly absurd enemies, confront bosses inspired by the worst clichés of the modern corporate world, and hold out until the end of the workday.

Company Resources (also known as Game Mechanics)

Endless Reports (Fast-paced action)
Face waves of enemies in quick, chaotic stages that only get harder over time.


Office Arsenal (Weapons and upgrades)
Futuristic rifles might just get the job done—collect weapons and combine upgrades to create ridiculous strategies.

Diverse Staff (Playable heroes)
Each character starts with their own advantages: some are faster, others tougher, and some show up late—but already with coffee in hand.

Frequent Meetings (Enemies and bosses)
Employees have been replaced by AIs with monitor heads; the machines have taken over your job and are heavily armed and determined to “solve” the office’s problems.

Face bosses inspired by AIs—from tireless supervisors to bot-assistants who refuse to accept sick notes.

Career Plan (Stage progression)
Climb the building floor by floor, discovering new enemies and different environments at each block of stages. There’s always a new excuse for “just one more try.”
3048290.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
